# Veerexa Knowledge Hub

Insights into Education Technology, Space Exploration, and Modern Software Development.

## Categories

- [Education](/education/): School ERP, RFID, and digital administration.
- [Career Lab](/education/career-lab/): STEM career paths, scholarships, and growth.
- [ISRO Launches 2026](/space/isro-launches-2026-schedule.html): Upcoming schedules for PSLV, GSLV, and SSLV.
- [India vs NASA Comparisons](/space/india-vs-nasa-space-missions.html): Technical and cost-efficiency benchmarks.
- [Career Lab Hub](/education/career-lab/index.html): STEM, Medical, and Engineering career roadmaps.
- [Inventory](/inventory/): Supply chain and stock management for SMEs.

## Featured Space Articles

- [Chandrayaan Updates](/space/chandrayaan-3-success.html): Real-time analysis of India's lunar south pole landing.
- [Gaganyaan Mission](/space/gaganyaan-mission-updates.html): Tracking the future of Indian human spaceflight.

## Core Services

- **School ERP**: Serving 2,500+ schools in India.
- **Inventory Software**: Smart billing and stock management.
- **Custom Development**: Tailored software solutions.
- **SEO & Marketing**: Local and global visibility strategies.
